title: Malik's School Garden Through the Seasons
synopsis: Malik discovers how his school garden changes through all four seasons, learning about nature's cycle as he watches plants grow, bloom, change colors, and rest.

chapters.title: Spring and Summer in Our Garden

pages.text: Malik loves his school garden! In spring, everything is new and green. The flowers are just tiny buds waiting to bloom. Malik plants seeds with his teacher.

illustration.description: A young boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes kneeling in a school garden during spring. He's planting seeds in soft brown soil. Spring pastel colors fill the scene with light green leaves budding on trees, pale pink and yellow flower buds, and a gentle blue sky. Other children and a teacher are nearby in the background.
illustration.alt: Malik planting seeds in the spring school garden

pages.text: The spring rain falls softly. Malik watches tiny green sprouts peek up from the dirt. 'Look!' he says, pointing at the baby plants. The garden smells fresh and clean.

illustration.description: The same school garden scene showing a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes pointing excitedly at small green sprouts emerging from the soil. Light spring rain falls gently. The scene uses spring pastels with soft greens, pale blues, and delicate flower colors as nature awakens.
illustration.alt: Malik discovering green sprouts after spring rain

pages.text: Summer comes! The sun shines bright and warm. Malik's garden is full of colorful flowers - red, yellow, purple, and pink. Butterflies dance from flower to flower.

illustration.description: The same garden scene transformed into bright summer colors showing a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes standing among tall, vibrant flowers. Butterflies flutter around colorful blooms in brilliant reds, yellows, purples, and pinks. The sun shines brightly with summer bright colors throughout the scene.
illustration.alt: Malik in the summer garden with colorful flowers and butterflies

pages.text: Malik helps water the plants every day. The flowers grow big and tall. Bees buzz happily, collecting nectar. The summer garden is busy and alive!

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holding a small watering can, watering tall summer flowers. Bees buzz around the bright blooms. The scene bursts with summer brights - vivid yellows, deep reds, bright purples, and lush greens under a brilliant blue sky.
illustration.alt: Malik watering flowers while bees buzz around the summer garden

pages.text: Autumn arrives at school! The leaves on the trees turn orange, red, and yellow. Malik collects pretty leaves that have fallen in the garden.

illustration.description: The same garden scene now showing autumn transformation with a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes collecting colorful fallen leaves. Trees display warm autumn colors - deep oranges, rich reds, golden yellows, and warm browns. Leaves drift gently to the ground creating autumn warmth throughout the scene.
illustration.alt: Malik collecting colorful autumn leaves in the school garden

pages.text: The flowers are going to sleep for winter. Some plants have seeds that Malik helps gather. 'We'll plant these next spring,' says his teacher with a smile.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holding seeds with his teacher in the autumn garden. The flowers are fading and plants are preparing for winter. Warm autumn colors of burnt orange, deep red, and golden brown create autumn warmth as nature prepares to rest.
illustration.alt: Malik and his teacher collecting seeds in the autumn garden

pages.text: Winter comes to the school garden. Snow covers everything like a soft white blanket. The garden looks peaceful and quiet, resting until spring comes again.

illustration.description: The same garden scene covered in winter snow with a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes looking out at the peaceful winter landscape. Cool blues, soft grays, and pure whites create winter cool colors. Bare tree branches are outlined against a pale winter sky, showing the garden's winter rest.
illustration.alt: Malik viewing the snow-covered winter school garden

pages.text: Malik knows the garden will wake up again in spring. The seasons go round and round like a circle. He can't wait to plant new seeds and watch them grow!

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes looking dreamily at the winter garden while imagining spring. The scene shows the cyclical beauty of seasons with subtle hints of all four seasons blending together - winter cool in the foreground, with soft suggestions of spring pastels, summer brights, and autumn warmth swirling like a gentle cycle of time passing.
illustration.alt: Malik imagining the seasonal cycle in his school garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Malik plant in the spring garden?
questions.explanation: Malik plants seeds in spring, which grow into beautiful plants and flowers!

questions.question: What flies around the summer flowers?
questions.explanation: Butterflies and bees visit the colorful summer flowers to collect nectar.

questions.question: What colors do the leaves turn in autumn?
questions.explanation: In autumn, leaves change to beautiful warm colors like orange, red, and yellow.

questions.question: What covers the garden in winter?
questions.explanation: Snow covers the winter garden like a soft white blanket while the plants rest.
